driver.tshirt:
Flat lay product mockup of a {{TEE_COLOR}} oversized boxy fit t-shirt (drop shoulders, wide sleeves, slightly cropped length) on a neutral gray background, showing front and back views side by side. Premium heavyweight cotton texture. No official team logos, badges, or trademarked insignia anywhere on the garment.

FRONT: On the LEFT CHEST — small clean typography "{{LAST_NAME}} · {{NUMBER}}" with "{{LAST_NAME}}" in white and "{{NUMBER}}" in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}}. Directly below in very small fine-print accent text: "{{NICKNAME}}" in gold italics. Thin horizontal accent line in white and gold extending slightly outward. On the RIGHT CHEST — {{FRONT_BADGE}} (original fan-created artistic graphic, not an official reproduction). Crew neck with slightly thick ribbing.

BACK: TOP — "{{NICKNAME}}" in large bold spaced-out white letters as the hero text. CENTER — large bold "{{NUMBER}}" in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}}. Overlapping the number on one side — {{UNIQUE_ELEMENT}} as the original artistic graphic element. Diagonal racing streaks in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} and {{SECONDARY_COLOR}} slicing across dynamically. {{BACK_GRAPHIC}}. BOTTOM — "{{TEAM_NAME}}" in plain neutral sans-serif white type (no logo, no official branding style replication) with a thin {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} underline.

Style direction: {{STYLE_NOTES}} All graphic elements are original artistic interpretations inspired by the driver's identity. This is an independent fan art creation not affiliated with, endorsed by, or licensed by Formula 1, the FIA, or any Formula 1 team. No official logos or licensed marks.
driver.hoodie:
Flat lay product mockup of a {{TEE_COLOR}} oversized heavyweight hoodie (relaxed fit, kangaroo pocket, ribbed cuffs and hem) on a neutral gray background, showing front and back views side by side. Premium 400gsm fleece texture. No official team logos, badges, or trademarked insignia anywhere on the garment.

FRONT: On the LEFT CHEST — "{{LAST_NAME}} · {{NUMBER}}" with "{{LAST_NAME}}" in white and "{{NUMBER}}" in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}}. Below in very small fine-print: "{{NICKNAME}}" in gold italics. Thin white and gold accent line. On the RIGHT CHEST — {{FRONT_BADGE}} (original fan-created graphic). Hood with {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} drawcords. Ribbed cuffs.

BACK: TOP — "{{NICKNAME}}" in large spaced-out white letters as hero text. CENTER — large bold "{{NUMBER}}" in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}}. Overlapping the number — {{UNIQUE_ELEMENT}} as original artistic graphic. Diagonal speed lines in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} and {{SECONDARY_COLOR}}. {{BACK_GRAPHIC}}. BOTTOM — "{{TEAM_NAME}}" in plain neutral sans-serif white type with thin {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} underline, no branding style replication.

Style direction: {{STYLE_NOTES}} All elements are original fan artwork. No official logos or licensed marks. Not affiliated with Formula 1 or any F1 team.
driver.cap:
Product mockup of a black structured 6-panel cap (adjustable snapback, slightly curved brim) on a neutral gray surface, showing front, side, and back views. Premium wool-blend fabric.

FRONT PANEL: "{{LAST_NAME}}" embroidered in white with a fine {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} outline. Small "{{NUMBER}}" as accent below in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}}. SIDE PANEL: {{FRONT_BADGE}} as an original fan-art embroidered patch. BRIM UNDERSIDE: {{UNIQUE_ELEMENT}} as subtle fine-line embroidery detail.

BACK PANEL: "{{NICKNAME}}" in arched embroidery in white. Snapback closure with {{SECONDARY_COLOR}} accent taping. {{BACK_GRAPHIC}} subtle side detail.

Style direction: {{STYLE_NOTES}} Original fan art — no official logos or licensed marks. Not affiliated with Formula 1 or any F1 team.
driver.tote:
Product mockup of a heavy-duty black canvas tote bag (long handles, structured rectangular base, 15oz canvas) on a neutral gray background, front and back views shown.

FRONT: Large bold screen-print — "{{LAST_NAME}} · {{NUMBER}}" in white. Centered below: {{UNIQUE_ELEMENT}} as the hero graphic in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} and {{SECONDARY_COLOR}}. Below that: "{{NICKNAME}}" in fine italic gold type. Near handle: {{FRONT_BADGE}} as a small badge detail. {{BACK_GRAPHIC}}.

BACK: "{{TEAM_NAME}}" in minimal spaced-out white sans-serif (no branding style, plain type only) with a thin {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} underline.

Style direction: {{STYLE_NOTES}} Original fan art. No official logos or licensed marks. Not affiliated with Formula 1 or any F1 team.

championship.tshirt:
Flat lay product mockup of a {{TEE_COLOR}} oversized boxy fit t-shirt (drop shoulders, wide sleeves, slightly cropped length) on a neutral gray background, showing front and back views side by side. Premium heavyweight cotton texture. CHAMPIONSHIP EDITION. No official team logos, badges, or trademarked insignia anywhere on the garment.

FRONT: On the LEFT CHEST — small clean typography "{{LAST_NAME}} · 1" with "{{LAST_NAME}}" in white and "1" in gold. Directly below in very small fine-print: "{{NICKNAME}}" in gold italics. Thin horizontal accent line in white and gold. On the RIGHT CHEST — {{FRONT_BADGE}} (original fan-created artistic badge, not an official reproduction). Crew neck with slightly thick ribbing.

BACK: TOP — "{{NICKNAME}}" in large bold spaced-out white letters as the hero text. CENTER — large bold "1" in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} with an original artistic gold champion's crown illustration integrated directly above the 1, slightly oversized for streetwear impact. Overlapping the number on one side — {{UNIQUE_ELEMENT}} as the original artistic graphic element. Diagonal racing streaks in {{PRIMARY_COLOR}} and {{SECONDARY_COLOR}} slicing across the back dynamically. {{BACK_GRAPHIC}}. BOTTOM — "{{TEAM_NAME}}" in plain neutral sans-serif white type (no logo, no official branding style) with a thin gold underline. Below the team name — championship years "{{CHAMP_YEARS}}" in gold spaced fine-print text.

Style direction: {{STYLE_NOTES}} All graphic elements are original artistic interpretations. This is an independent fan art creation not affiliated with, endorsed by, or licensed by Formula 1, the FIA, or any Formula 1 team. No official logos or licensed marks.
